abilities.textEn: Once during your turn, heal 20 damage from your Active Pokémon.

attacks.textEn: Heal 100 damage from each of your Basic Pokémon.
Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 40 more damage.
Heal 10 damage from this Pokémon.
Search your deck for up to 3 Basic Energy cards and attach them to your Pokémon in any way you like. Then, shuffle your deck.
Look at your opponent's hand. This attack does 50 damage for each Trainer card you find there.
Switch your opponent's Active Pokémon with 1 of their Benched Pokémon. Your opponent chooses the new Active Pokémon.

abilities.textEn: If you have a Karrablast on your side of the field, this Pokémon can evolve on your first turn or the turn you play it.

attacks.textEn: Flip a coin. If heads, discard an Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.
Heal damage from this Pokémon equal to the damage done to your opponent's Active Pokémon.
This Pokémon can't use any attacks during your next turn.

abilities.textEn: As many times as you like during your turn, you may search your hand for a basic Fire Energy and attach it to 1 of your Pokémon.

attacks.textEn: Draw 1 card.
Search your deck for up to 3 Fire Pokémon and Basic Fire Energy in any combination, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.
This attack does 50 more damage for each Prize card your opponent has already taken. Discard 1 Energy from this Pokémon.
This attack does 30 damage for each Energy attached to this Pokémon.

abilities.textEn: Once during your turn, you may switch your Active Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon. If you do, your opponent switches their Active Pokémon with 1 of their Benched Pokémon.

attacks.textEn: This attack does 50 more damage for each Energy attached to this Pokémon.
If your opponent's Active Pokémon has any damage counters on it, this attack fails.
Discard 1 Fire Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.
Discard 1 Energy from this Pokémon.
Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.
Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.
Flip 2 coins. This attack does 90 damage for each heads. If you flipped at least 1 heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.
If this Pokémon moved from your Bench to your Active spot this turn, this attack does 90 more damage.
This attack's damage isn't affected by any effects on your opponent's Active Pokémon.
This attack also does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)
Flip a coin. If tails, this attack fails.
Discard all Lightning Energy from this Pokémon. This attack does 50 damage for each card discarded.
If this Pokémon has any Fighting Energy attached, this attack does 20 more damage.
Choose 1 of your Benched Pokémon. Return that Pokémon and all cards attached to it to your hand.
During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes 40 less damage from attacks.
This attack does 70 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness or Resistance.
Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.
Choose 1 of your Benched Pokémon. Move all damage counters on that Pokémon to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.
Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.
Look at the top 5 cards of your opponent's deck, rearrange them in any order, and return them to their deck.

abilities.textEn: While this Pokémon is in the Active spot, once during your turn, you may use this Ability. Your opponent shuffles their hand into their deck. Then, your opponent draws 3 cards.

attacks.textEn: If you and your opponent have the same number of cards in hand, this attack does 90 more damage.
During your opponent's next turn, your opponent can't play any Item cards from their hand.

abilities.textEn: While this Pokémon is in the Active spot, your opponent can't play any Item or Pokémon Tool cards from their hand.

attacks.textEn: If this Pokémon has 2 more Energy attached than required, this attack does 80 more damage.
During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes 40 less damage from attacks.
If your opponent's Active Pokémon's Resistance is Fighting type, this attack does 50 more damage.
This attack does 20 damage for each damage counter on all of your Benched Fighting Pokémon.
If your opponent's Active Pokémon is not a Pokémon ex, this attack fails. This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness or Resistance.
Flip 2 coins. This attack does 30 more damage for each heads.

abilities.textEn: Once during your turn, while this Pokémon is in the Active spot, you may devolve 1 of your opponent's evolved Pokémon by removing the top Evolution card and returning it to your opponent's hand.

attacks.textEn: This attack's damage isn't affected by Resistance.
If any of your Pokémon were Knocked Out during your opponent's last turn, this attack does 80 more damage.
Search your deck for up to 3 Darkness Pokémon, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.
Discard a random card from your opponent's hand without looking.
Flip a coin for each of your Darkness Pokémon in play. This attack does 60 damage for each heads.
Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.
This Pokémon also does 10 damage to itself.
This attack does 30 damage for each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.
Choose 1 of your opponent's Active Pokémon's attacks and use it as this attack.
Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.
Flip 2 coins. This attack does 40 damage for each heads.

abilities.textEn: If this Pokémon's attack Knocks Out your opponent's Basic Pokémon, take 1 more Prize card.

attacks.textEn: The Pokémon hit by this attack can't retreat during your opponent's next turn.
This attack does 20 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon for each Energy attached to this Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)
During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes 10 less damage from attacks.
During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes 20 less damage from attacks.

abilities.textEn: While this Pokémon is in play, all of your Pokémon with Metal Energy attached take 20 less damage from your opponent's attacks.

attacks.textEn: If you have any Durant on your Bench, this attack does 20 more damage.
This attack's damage isn't affected by any effects on your opponent's Active Pokémon.
Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 60 more damage.
Search your deck for a Item card, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.
During your next turn, this Pokémon's Lunge attack does 240 damage.
Flip a coin. If tails, this attack fails.
Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.
Switch your opponent's Active Pokémon with 1 of their Benched Pokémon. Your opponent chooses the new Active Pokémon.
Flip 3 coins. For each heads, put a card of your choice from your discard pile into your hand.
If this Pokémon has any Special Energy attached, this attack does 100 more damage.

abilities.textEn: This Pokémon takes 30 less damage from attacks.

attacks.textEn: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a Pokémon ex, this attack does 100 more damage.
Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 40 more damage.
Search your hand for a basic Energy and attach it to this Pokémon.
Move 1 basic Energy from this Pokémon to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

textJa: 自分のトラッシュから基本エネルギーを2枚まで選び、相手に見せて、手札に加える。
textEn: Put up to 2 Basic Energy cards from your discard pile into your hand.

textJa: おたがいの場のポケモンについている「ポケモンのどうぐ」を2枚まで選び、トラッシュする。
textEn: Choose up to 2 Pokémon Tools attached to Pokémon (yours or your opponent's) and discard them.

textJa: このカードは、HP60の★タイプのたねポケモンとして、場に出せる。このカードは、特殊状態にならず、にげられない。自分の番の中でなら、場に出ているこのカードをトラッシュできる。[特性] はねのまもり：このポケモンは、ベンチにいるかぎり、相手のポケモンからワザのダメージを受けない。
textEn: Play this card as if it were a 60-HP Basic ★ Pokémon. This card can't be affected by any Special Conditions and can't retreat. At any time during your turn, you may discard this card from play. [Ability] Plume Protection: As long as this Pokémon is on your Bench, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks from your opponent's Pokémon.

textJa: このカードをつけているポケモン（「ルールを持つポケモン」をのぞく）が使うワザの、相手のバトル場の「ポケモンex」へのダメージは「+30」される。
textEn: If the Pokémon this card is attached to doesn't have a Rule Box, the attacks it uses do 30 more damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon ex.

textJa: おたがいのプレイヤーは、それぞれ手札をすべて山札にもどして切る。その後、自分はコインを1回投げ、オモテなら自分は5枚、相手は3枚、山札を引く。ウラなら自分は3枚、相手は5枚、山札を引く。
textEn: Each player shuffles their hand into their deck. Then, flip a coin. If heads, you draw 5 cards, and your opponent draws 3 cards. If tails, you draw 3 cards, and your opponent draws 5 cards.

textJa: 自分の山札から進化ポケモンとエネルギーを1枚ずつ選び、相手に見せて、手札に加える。そして山札を切る。
textEn: Search your deck for an Evolution Pokémon and an Energy card, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

nameJa: イグニッションエネルギー
textJa: ポケモンについているこのカードは、自分の番の終わりにトラッシュする。このカードは、ポケモンについているかぎり、★エネルギー1個ぶんとしてはたらく。進化ポケモンについているなら、★エネルギー3個ぶんとしてはたらく。
textEn: If this card is attached to 1 of your Pokémon, discard it at the end of your turn. As long as this card is attached to a Pokémon, it provides ★ Energy. If this card is attached to an Evolution Pokémon, it provides ★★★ Energy instead.
